company.name: MHDTech
company.about: MHDTech is a leading UAE-based technology company founded in 2018, specializing in AI-powered software solutions, cloud infrastructure, cybersecurity services, and full-scale digital transformation. We serve over 500 clients across the GCC region, helping businesses modernize their operations and unlock the power of artificial intelligence. Our team of 120+ engineers and specialists is dedicated to delivering world-class technology products with unmatched support.

products.name: MHDChat AI
products.description: An enterprise-grade AI chatbot platform that integrates with your website, app, or CRM. Supports Arabic and English, trained on your business data.
features: Custom AI training on your data

products.name: MHDCloud Hosting
products.description: Scalable cloud hosting solutions powered by our private UAE datacenter with 99.99% uptime guarantee and full TDRA compliance.

products.name: MHDSecure
products.description: Comprehensive cybersecurity suite including firewall management, penetration testing, vulnerability assessments, and real-time threat monitoring.

products.name: MHDERP
products.description: A complete cloud-based ERP system tailored for GCC businesses. Covers finance, HR, procurement, inventory, and CRM in one unified platform.

price.note: One-time setup fee: AED 2,000 – 5,000 depending on plan

products.name: MHDAnalytics
products.description: AI-powered business intelligence platform. Connect your data sources and get real-time dashboards, predictive analytics, and automated reports.

products.name: MHDApp Builder
products.description: No-code/low-code mobile app development platform. Build iOS and Android apps visually with drag-and-drop — no programming required.

price.custom_development: Starting from AED 15,000 for fully custom apps

pricing_plans.name: Starter
pricing_plans.description: Perfect for small businesses and startups

pricing_plans.name: Enterprise
pricing_plans.description: For large organizations with complex needs

faq.question: What is MHDTech?
faq.answer: MHDTech is a UAE-based technology company founded in 2018. We specialize in AI solutions, cloud hosting, cybersecurity, ERP systems, and digital transformation services for businesses across the GCC region.

faq.question: Where is MHDTech located?
faq.answer: Our headquarters is at Dubai Internet City, Dubai, UAE. We also have support offices in Abu Dhabi and Riyadh. You can reach us at +971 4 800 6438 or support@mhdtech.com.

faq.question: How much does MHDChat AI cost?
faq.answer: MHDChat AI starts at AED 299/month (billed monthly) or AED 2,870/year (saving 20%). This includes unlimited conversations, Arabic and English support, and website integration. Enterprise pricing is available for custom deployments.

faq.question: Do you offer a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial on all our software products — no credit card required. You can sign up at www.mhdtech.com/trial or contact our sales team at sales@mhdtech.com.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard), bank transfers, and corporate invoicing. We support both monthly and annual billing. Enterprise clients can arrange custom payment terms.

faq.question: Is your cloud hosting TDRA compliant?
faq.answer: Yes, MHDCloud is fully compliant with UAE TDRA (Telecommunications and Digital Government Regulatory Authority) regulations. Our datacenter is located within the UAE, ensuring your data stays in the country.

faq.question: Do you support Arabic language?
faq.answer: Absolutely. All our products support Arabic language and RTL (right-to-left) interfaces natively. Our AI models are trained on Arabic and English data, and our support team speaks both languages.

faq.question: What is your uptime guarantee?
faq.answer: MHDCloud provides a 99.99% uptime SLA, which means less than 52 minutes of downtime per year. We have redundant systems and real-time monitoring. If we fail to meet the SLA, clients receive service credits.

faq.question: How long does it take to set up MHDChat AI?
faq.answer: Basic setup takes 1–3 business days. For custom AI training on your business data, it may take 5–10 business days. We handle the full setup and integration for you.

faq.question: Can I integrate MHDTech products with my existing systems?
faq.answer: Yes. All our products offer RESTful APIs and support common integrations including Salesforce, Zoho, Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, WhatsApp Business, and more. Our integration team can also build custom connectors.

faq.question: What is your refund policy?
faq.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all subscription plans. If you're not satisfied within the first 30 days, we'll issue a full refund — no questions asked. Custom development projects have separate terms.

faq.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.answer: You can cancel anytime from your account dashboard or by contacting support@mhdtech.com. For monthly plans, cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. Annual plans are refunded on a pro-rata basis within the 30-day guarantee.

faq.question: Do you offer custom software development?
faq.answer: Yes. Our development team can build fully custom web apps, mobile apps, AI systems, and enterprise platforms. Custom projects start from AED 15,000. Contact sales@mhdtech.com for a free quote.

faq.question: What technical support do you provide?
faq.answer: All plans include email support. Professional plans get priority support with a 4-hour response SLA. Enterprise clients have a dedicated account manager and 24/7 emergency phone support at +971 4 800 6438.

faq.question: How secure is my data?
faq.answer: We take security very seriously. All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). We are ISO 27001 aligned and conduct quarterly penetration tests. Data is stored in our UAE datacenter and never leaves the country.

faq.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faq.answer: Yes, you can change your plan at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately, and you'll be charged a pro-rated amount. Downgrades take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.

faq.question: Do you offer discounts for non-profits or startups?
faq.answer: Yes! We offer a 30% discount for registered non-profit organizations and a 20% startup discount for companies less than 2 years old. Contact sales@mhdtech.com with your registration documents to apply.

faq.question: What industries do you serve?
faq.answer: We serve businesses across all industries including retail, healthcare, finance, real estate, education, logistics, and government. Our solutions are adaptable and have been deployed in 15+ countries.

faq.question: How does MHDAnalytics connect to my data?
faq.answer: MHDAnalytics connects to 100+ data sources including Excel files, SQL databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MSSQL), Google Sheets, REST APIs, Salesforce, and more. The integration wizard guides you through in minutes.

faq.question: What is the contract length?
faq.answer: No long-term commitments required! Monthly plans can be cancelled anytime. Annual plans are prepaid for 12 months with a 20% discount. Enterprise plans typically have 1–3 year contracts with custom terms.

refund_policy.title: Refund Policy
details: 30-day money-back guarantee on all new subscriptions
Full refund if cancellation is within 30 days of first payment
Annual plans are pro-rated after the 30-day window
Custom development projects are non-refundable once work begins
Hardware products (servers, devices) are non-refundable after delivery
Refunds are processed within 5–10 business days

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
details: We collect only data necessary to provide our services
Personal data is stored in UAE-based servers and never transferred outside the UAE without consent
We do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes
Data is retained for the duration of your contract plus 12 months
You can request data deletion at privacy@mhdtech.com
We are fully compliant with UAE Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021 on Personal Data Protection

service_level_agreement.title: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
service_level_agreement.credits: If uptime falls below guaranteed levels, clients receive service credits of up to 30% of their monthly fee

terms_of_service.title: Terms of Service
key_points: Services are provided 'as is' and are subject to these terms
Users must be 18+ and have authority to enter contracts
Prohibited uses include illegal activities, spam, and abuse of our AI systems
We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate our Acceptable Use Policy
Governing law: UAE Federal Law, disputes resolved in Dubai Courts
We may update terms with 30 days notice

warranty.title: Warranty Policy
warranty.software: All software products are covered by a 12-month bug-fix warranty. We will fix any confirmed bugs at no additional cost.
warranty.custom_development: Custom development projects include 6 months of free bug fixes after delivery.
warranty.hardware: Hardware products carry a 1-year manufacturer warranty handled through MHDTech.
